course_description.overview: Baltic states' premier gran fondo through Estonian forests and coastal roads.

key_segments.name: Unknown
key_segments.description: No specific segments identified in available data.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Approximately 130 km road cycling event with varied terrain including forests and coastal areas; specific profile unavailable.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Tallinn Airport (TLL); Tallinn is the capital with excellent international connections.
logistics.accommodation: Abundant hotels in Tallinn's historic Old Town and surrounding areas.
logistics.registration_details: Unknown; check official event site when available.
logistics.bike_logistics: Standard road bike; transport via bike boxes on flights to Tallinn.
logistics.local_considerations: Cool Baltic climate; potential wind from coast; smooth Estonian roads expected.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic Baltic road gran fondo blending forests, coast, and Estonian charm.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking a regional challenge in the Baltics with natural beauty.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for adventure seekers; limited data but promising as premier Baltic event.
pro_tips: Prepare for coastal winds and variable weather.
Explore Tallinn's UNESCO Old Town pre/post event.
Opt for road bike with good aerodynamics for fast sections.
Register early as regional events fill quickly.
